name: @revheat/design-tokens
description: RevHeat design tokens — the runtime distribution of the RevHeat design system (SYSTEM.md contract): CSS custom properties, Tailwind 3 preset, Tailwind 4 theme, self-hosted Geist/Geist Mono fonts, and brand assets.

scripts.verify: node contrast-check.mjs && node css-parse-check.mjs && node -e "require('./tailwind3-preset.js')" && node --test
